import { Observable } from '../Observable'; import { executeSchedule } from '../util/executeSchedule'; export function scheduleAsyncIterable(input, scheduler) { if (!input) { throw new Error('Iterable cannot be null'); } return new Observable(function (subscriber) { executeSchedule(subscriber, scheduler, function () { var iterator = input[Symbol.asyncIterator](); executeSchedule(subscriber, scheduler, function () { iterator.next().then(function (result) { if (result.done) { subscriber.complete(); } else { subscriber.next(result.value); } }); }, 0, true); }); }); } //# sourceMappingURL=scheduleAsyncIterable.js.map
